privileged_info_summary: The task uses synthetic data: 6 medication records for 3 pets (Luna, Max, Bella) embedded in the setup script. The dataset contains intentional data quality issues including mixed date formats (MM/DD/YYYY, DD-MMM-YY, YYYY-MM-DD) and missing Last Refill dates. Verified pet medications: Luna (Thyroid Pills: 60 pills/bottle, 2 daily, $28.50; Heart Med: 60 pills/bottle, 1 daily, $67.00), Max (Arthritis Med: 90 pills/bottle, 1.5 daily, $45.00; Probiotic: 120 pills/bottle, 2 daily, $35.50), Bella (Allergy Pills: 30 pills/bottle, 1 daily, $22.00; Flea Prevention: 6 pills/bottle, 0.033 daily, $89.99). The example calculation is mathematically correct: Luna's Thyroid Pills with Last Refill date of April 3, 2024 equals 27 days elapsed as of April 30, 2024.
